284.name: Volcanic Greataxe
284.description:
An axe forged in the heart of a volcano, eternally
burning with magical flame.

285.name: Leviathan Fang Spear
285.description:
A spear made from the fang of a legendary sea 
serpent that controls water.

286.name: Thunder Lizard Gauntlets
286.description:
Gauntlets made from the scales of an ancient 
thunder lizard, crackling with electricity.

287.name: Arcane Crossbow
287.description:
A crossbow that fires bolts of pure magical 
energy.

288.name: Soul Drain Flail
288.description:
A flail with a head made of crystallized soul 
energy that drains life force.

289.name: Morphblade
289.description:
A magical sword that can change its size from 
dagger to greatsword at will.

290.name: Banshee's Wail
290.description:
A whip made from the hair of a banshee that 
screams when used.

291.name: Celestial Hammer
291.description:
A hammer forged from a fragment of a fallen star, 
glowing with celestial energy.

292.name: Frost Dragon Claws
292.description:
Claws carved from the teeth of an ancient frost 
dragon, emanating bitter cold.

293.name: World Tree Branch
293.description:
A staff made from a branch of the World Tree, 
containing ancient nature magic.

294.name: Soulstring Bow
294.description:
A magical bow that forms arrows from the wielder's
own life force.

295.name: Hero's Legacy
295.description:
A sword that contains the trapped soul of an 
ancient hero, granting wisdom in battle.

296.name: Bloodthirster
296.description:
A sword that becomes lighter and sharper with each
kill, feeding on blood.

297.name: Earthshaker Mace
297.description:
A mace made from a chunk of elemental earth, 
causing tremors on impact.

298.name: Dimension Blade
298.description:
A sword that can cut through the fabric of reality
to create dimensional portals.

299.name: Infinite Quiver
299.description:
A magical crossbow that never needs to be 
reloaded, materializing bolts from thin air.

300.name: Lightning Elemental Fists
300.description:
Gauntlets made from the essence of a lightning 
elemental, striking with electric fury.

301.name: Chronomancer's Staff
301.description:
A staff crafted from crystallized time, allowing 
the wielder to slow enemies.

302.name: Twilight Edge
302.description:
A sword forged from the essence of twilight, 
existing between light and shadow.

303.name: Moonlight Bow
303.description:
A bow carved from moonlight that fires arrows of 
pure lunar energy.

304.name: Bound Elemental Axe
304.description:
An axe that contains a bound fire elemental, 
constantly ablaze with magical flames.

305.name: Phoenix Intestines
305.description:
A whip made from the intestines of a phoenix, 
burning with eternal fire.

306.name: Nightmare Gauntlets
306.description:
Gauntlets crafted from the solidified essence of 
nightmares, causing fear on contact.

307.name: Spellbreaker Blade
307.description:
A magical crystalline sword that absorbs spells 
cast at its wielder.

308.name: Unicorn Horn Staff
308.description:
A staff made from the horn of a legendary unicorn,
with powerful healing magic.

309.name: T-Pillar Blade
309.description:
An impossibly precise stone blade from Göbekli 
Tepe, carved with animal pictographs.

310.name: Vulture Totem Staff
310.description:
A staff topped with the carved vulture of Göbekli 
Tepe, allowing communion with ancient spirits.

311.name: Fox Spirit Fists
311.description:
Stone gauntlets carved with the fox symbols of 
Göbekli Tepe, granting supernatural speed and cunning.

312.name: Stellar Sling
312.description:
A mysterious sling from Göbekli Tepe that turns 
ordinary stones into devastating projectiles of stellar energy.

313.name: Boar Totem Hammer
313.description:
A massive stone hammer carved with the boar 
symbols from Göbekli Tepe, channeling primal strength.

314.name: Serpent Caller
314.description:
A spear tipped with a stone carving from Göbekli 
Tepe that summons serpent spirits when thrown.

315.name: Cosmic Pendulum
315.description:
A mysterious flail from Göbekli Tepe with 
astronomical carvings that distorts space around it.

316.name: Soul Cleaver
316.description:
A ceremonial axe from Göbekli Tepe that cuts 
through both physical matter and spiritual energy.

317.name: Crane Talons
317.description:
Ritual claws from Göbekli Tepe that allow the 
wearer to assume aspects of the sacred crane.

318.name: Bull Totem Bow
318.description:
A bow carved from impossible stone, adorned with 
the bull carvings of Göbekli Tepe.

319.name: Star Cutter
319.description:
A curved blade from Göbekli Tepe inscribed with 
forgotten constellation patterns.

320.name: Portal Disc
320.description:
A strange circular weapon from Göbekli Tepe that 
creates portals when thrown, returning to the wielder.

321.name: Knowledge Seeker
321.description:
A mysterious dagger from Göbekli Tepe that reveals
hidden knowledge when blood touches its blade.

322.name: Celestial Alignment Rod
322.description:
A staff from Göbekli Tepe crowned with carvings of
the sun and moon, controlling celestial energies.

323.name: Gravity Spear
323.description:
A primitive-looking but technologically advanced 
spear from Göbekli Tepe that can control gravity.

324.name: Skystone Greatsword
324.description:
A massive stone sword from Göbekli Tepe that's 
impossibly light, inscribed with lost astronomical knowledge.

325.name: Phasing Touch
325.description:
Gauntlets from Göbekli Tepe that phase through 
matter, allowing the wearer to reach into objects.

326.name: Liquid Stone Whip
326.description:
A mysterious whip from Göbekli Tepe made of 
impossible stone links that moves like liquid.

327.name: Planar Divider
327.description:
A ceremonial axe from Göbekli Tepe that can cut 
through the barriers between worlds.

328.name: Thought Projector
328.description:
A stone-carved launcher from Göbekli Tepe that 
fires energy bolts powered by thoughts.

329.name: Timeflow Manipulator
329.description:
A bizarre Göbekli Tepe artifact that warps time 
around the wielder, increasing their speed.

330.name: EHI Crude Projector
330.description:
An industrial cannon that fires pressurized crude 
oil. Devastating but extremely unstable and may ignite the wielder.

331.name: EHI Petroleum Edge
331.description:
A chainsaw sword dripping with oil that constantly
corrodes its wielder's armor.

332.name: EHI Toxic Amplifier
332.description:
A staff containing volatile petroleum derivatives 
that amplifies magic but damages the user's health with toxic fumes.

333.name: EHI Petrochem Injectors
333.description:
Gauntlets that inject oil-based performance 
enhancers, greatly increasing strength but causing severe organ damage.

334.name: EHI Knowledge Injector
334.description:
A crossbow that fires bolts containing 
encyclopedic knowledge.

335.name: EHI Compression Maul
335.description:
A massive hammer containing compressed oil that 
creates devastating shockwaves but severely slows the wielder.

336.name: EHI Omniscient Binder
336.description:
A whip made from living encyclopedia pages that 
bind enemies with knowledge but confuse the wielder with constant whispers.

337.name: EHI Memetic Rifle
337.description:
A rifle that fires knowledge crystallized into 
bullets, devastating to enemies but causing memory loss in the user.

338.name: EHI Omniscience Edge
338.description:
A sword with a blade made of encyclopedia pages 
compressed to diamond hardness, cutting through defenses but driving its wielder insane.

339.name: EHI Combustion Lance
339.description:
A spear tipped with crystallized oil that ignites 
on impact, creating massive explosions but severely burning the user.

340.name: EHI Forbidden Codex
340.description:
A staff containing the complete knowledge of 
ancient civilizations, granting immense magical power but rapidly aging the user.

341.name: EHI Psychoactive Talons
341.description:
Claws infused with a mixture of rare oils and 
encyclopedic knowledge, granting unnatural speed but causing hallucinations.

342.name: EHI Identity Eraser
342.description:
A bow that fires arrows containing concentrated 
knowledge, shattering minds but causing the user to forget their own identity.

343.name: EHI Petrocorruptor
343.description:
An axe with a blade made of hyper-compressed oil 
that cuts through anything but slowly corrupts the wielder's body.

344.name: EHI Headache Inducer
344.description:
A pistol that fires bullets containing compressed 
encyclopedic knowledge, overwhelming targets but causing crippling migraines.

345.name: EHI Suicide Bomber
345.description:
A flail with heads containing volatile oil that 
explodes on impact, damaging everyone

346.name: EHI Flesh Dissolver
346.description:
A dagger with a blade made of shimmering oil that 
phases through armor but slowly dissolves the wielder's flesh.

347.name: EHI Brain Hemorrhager
347.description:
A launcher that fires projectiles containing the 
distilled essence of an entire library, overwhelming enemies with knowledge but causing cerebral hemorrhaging in the user.

348.name: EHI Apocalypse Fists
348.description:
Gauntlets containing all the world's oil reserves 
in compressed form, granting godlike strength but causing rapid cellular degeneration.

349.name: EHI Petroleum Omniscience
349.description:
A staff containing the complete oil-based 
knowledge of the universe.

350.name: Mind Projector Staff
350.description:
A staff that amplifies psychic abilities, allowing
the wielder to project mental attacks directly into enemies' minds.

351.name: Telekinetic Gauntlets
351.description:
Gauntlets that amplify telekinetic abilities, 
allowing the wielder to strike enemies from a distance with psychic force.

352.name: Psionic Edge
352.description:
A crystal blade that channels psychic energy, 
cutting through mental defenses and physical armor alike.

353.name: Mind Arrow Bow
353.description:
A bow that fires arrows of pure mental energy, 
bypassing physical defenses to damage the target's psyche.

354.name: Psychic Crown
354.description:
A bracelet that focuses mental energy into 
devastating psychic attacks against all nearby enemies.

355.name: Brainwave Amplifier
355.description:
A device that amplifies and focuses brainwaves 
into concentrated beams of destructive mental energy.

356.name: Force Crush Gloves
356.description:
Gloves embedded with crystals that channel 
telekinetic force to crush opponents from within.

357.name: Memory Thief
357.description:
A dagger that absorbs the thoughts and memories of
those it cuts, transferring knowledge to the wielder.

358.name: Mind Shield Staff
358.description:
A stafgf that creates powerful force fields to 
protect allies while reflecting PSI damage.

359.name: Spell Absorber
359.description:
A staff wrapped in magical wards that absorbs 
hostile spells and stores their energy for later use.

360.name: Wardbreaker Blade
360.description:
A sword crafted with enchantments specifically 
designed to cut through magical protections and wards.

361.name: Spellbreaker Crossbow
361.description:
A crossbow enchanted to fire bolts that disrupt 
magical energy, temporarily nullifying a target's magical abilities.

362.name: Spellcrusher Maul
362.description:
A hammer infused with anti-magic properties that 
shatters magical constructs and barriers with ease.

363.name: Barrier Staff
363.description:
A staff that creates powerful barriers of magical 
energy to protect the wielder and allies from harm.

364.name: Arcane Blade
364.description:
A sword with a blade of pure magical energy that 
causes devastating arcane damage.

365.name: Spellseeker Bow
365.description:
A bow that fires arrows of concentrated magical 
energy that seek out and strike their targets.

366.name: Arcane Shield Gauntlets
366.description:
Gauntlets that create shields of pure magical 
energy to protect against physical and magical attacks.

367.name: Elemental Warden Staff
367.description:
A staff imbued with protection magic that can 
create barriers against specific elemental attacks.

368.name: Divine Smiter
368.description:
A golden sword that channels divine magic to smite
evil and undead with holy power.

369.name: Warding Spear
369.description:
A spear wrapped in protective enchantments that 
create fields of defensive magic around the wielder.

370.name: Arcane Sphere
370.description:
A magical orb that surrounds the wielder with 
protective energy while launching arcane attacks.

371.name: Spelldrainer Edge
371.description:
A black blade that absorbs magical attacks and 
converts them into additional cutting power.

372.name: Psychic Amplifier Crown
372.description:
A circlet that projects the wearer's thoughts as 
psychic attacks while providing mental shields.

373.name: Mind Piercer
373.description:
A rifle that fires bullets of concentrated psychic
energy that penetrate mental defenses.

374.name: Mind Ripper Claws
374.description:
Crystal claws that channel psychic energy to tear 
through both physical armor and mental barriers.

375.name: Mindlash Whip
375.description:
A whip made of concentrated thought energy that 
lashes both body and mind.

376.name: Thought Crusher
376.description:
A hammer that shatters not only physical forms but
the very thoughts of its targets.

377.name: Mind Manipulator Gloves
377.description:
Gloves that allow the wearer to reach directly 
into the minds of enemies, extracting or altering thoughts.

378.name: Neural Disruptor
378.description:
A weapon that fires concentrated bolts of mental 
energy directly into the target's mind.

379.name: Mental Fortress Staff
379.description:
A staff that creates impenetrable barriers of pure
mental energy.

380.name: Scrap Metal Shiv
380.description:
A crude blade made from sharpened scrap metal 
bound to a pipe with electrical tape.

381.name: Nail Bat
381.description:
A baseball bat wrapped in barbed wire and rusty 
nails for extra damage.

382.name: Pipe Wrench Mace
382.description:
A length of pipe with a heavy valve attached to 
one end as a makeshift mace.

383.name: Junk Slingshot
383.description:
A homemade slingshot made from a forked tree 
branch and rubber cut from old tires.

384.name: Broom Spear
384.description:
A rough spear made from a broom handle with a 
kitchen knife duct-taped to the end.

385.name: Hubcap Axe
385.description:
A crude axe made from a sharpened car part 
attached to a wooden handle.

386.name: PVC Bow
386.description:
A makeshift bow constructed from PVC pipe with 
string made from unraveled rope.

387.name: Glass Knuckles
387.description:
Gloves with broken glass and metal fragments 
embedded for devastating punches.

388.name: Bike Chain Flail
388.description:
A chain made from bike parts with a padlock 
attached to the end as a flail.

389.name: Junk Crossbow
389.description:
A homemade crossbow made from scavenged lumber, 
springs, and metal parts.

390.name: Concrete Sledge
390.description:
A sledgehammer with chunks of concrete still 
attached to its head for extra weight.

391.name: Razor Disc Claws
391.description:
Razor blades and broken CD shards attached to 
fingerless gloves for slashing attacks.

392.name: Garden Sprayer Flamer
392.description:
A crude flamethrower made from a garden sprayer, 
lighter, and gasoline.

393.name: Nail Mop Staff
393.description:
A short staff made from an old mop handle with 
nails driven through the end.

394.name: Pipe Gun
394.description:
A makeshift gun pieced together from pipes, wood, 
and springs that fires small metal scraps.

395.name: Stop Sign Cleaver
395.description:
A jagged blade fashioned from a broken stop sign 
attached to a wooden handle.

396.name: Cord Whip
396.description:
A whip made from electrical cords and extension 
cables tied together.

397.name: Leaf Spring Machete
397.description:
A crude sword fashioned from a car's leaf spring, 
sharpened along one edge.

398.name: Pressure Gun
398.description:
A homemade harpoon gun made from a pressure 
washer, with metal rods as ammunition.

399.name: Rubble Launcher
399.description:
A makeshift launcher that fires chunks of concrete
with elastic surgical tubing.

400.name: Nail Board
400.description:
A bunch of rusty nails secured to the end of a 
table leg with wire and duct tape.

401.name: Car Panel Claws
401.description:
Strips of metal from a car's chassis, sharpened 
and attached to gardening gloves.

402.name: Saw Blade Sword
402.description:
A wooden plank with rusted saw blades attached to 
create a crude sword.

403.name: Bike Pump Air Gun
403.description:
A makeshift air gun made from PVC pipe and a 
bicycle pump to fire small projectiles.

404.name: Rebar Club
404.description:
A length of rebar with a concrete chunk still 
attached at one end.

405.name: Mirror Shard Fist
405.description:
Shards of mirror glass attached to duct tape 
wrapped around the hands.

406.name: Modified Wrench
406.description:
A large wrench with nuts and bolts welded to it 
for additional damage.

407.name: Razor Fire Axe
407.description:
An old fire axe with razor blades attached to the 
striking edge with electrical tape.

408.name: Pipe Slingshot
408.description:
An elastic slingshot made from a forked metal pipe
and inner tube rubber.

409.name: Razor Mop
409.description:
A mop with razor wire wrapped around its head for 
slashing attacks.

410.name: Antenna Rapier
410.description:
A car antenna reinforced with tape and a sharpened
tip for quick thrusting attacks.

411.name: Trusty Frying Pan
411.description:
A frying pan with the handle reinforced by duct 
tape, simple but effective.

412.name: Staple Shooter
412.description:
A modified staple gun that fires metal scraps at 
surprising velocity.

413.name: Barbed Hockey Stick
413.description:
A hockey stick with the blade wrapped in barbed 
wire and metal scraps.

414.name: Golf Tee Glove
414.description:
A golf glove with golf tees sewn through it, 
points outward, for punching.

415.name: Deadly Plunger
415.description:
A toilet plunger modified with sharpened metal 
affixed to the rubber cup.

416.name: Hairspray Torch
416.description:
A can of hairspray with a lighter taped to it, 
creating a small flamethrower.

417.name: Ruler Shiv
417.description:
A wooden ruler reinforced with metal strips and 
sharpened to a point.

418.name: Sign Post
418.description:
A street sign post pulled from the ground, still 
with concrete at the base.

419.name: Sand-Filled Hose
419.description:
A length of garden hose filled with sand and 
sealed at both ends.

420.name: Broken Bottle
420.description:
A broken bottle with the jagged end wrapped in 
cloth for a handle.

421.name: Shower Rod Bow
421.description:
A simple bow made from a bent shower curtain rod 
and paracord.

422.name: Mower Blade Axe
422.description:
A lawn mower blade attached to a wooden handle 
with bolts and wire.

423.name: Key Knuckles
423.description:
Keys jammed between fingers with tape to secure 
them in place.

424.name: Hanger Slingshot
424.description:
A simple slingshot made from a wire coat hanger 
and rubber bands.

425.name: Kitchen Cleaver
425.description:
A meat cleaver with its handle wrapped in grip 
tape for better control.

426.name: Spiked Crutch
426.description:
A crutch with nails driven through the top and 
reinforced with duct tape.

427.name: Spike Umbrella
427.description:
An umbrella with sharpened ends on the tips of the
ribs.

428.name: Modified Cap Gun
428.description:
A toy cap gun modified to shoot small metal 
projectiles.

429.name: Garden Shear Claws
429.description:
Gardening shears attached to gloves to create 
makeshift claws.

430.name: Sharpened Shovel
430.description:
A shovel sharpened along the edge to create a 
crude cutting tool.

431.name: Skewer Dart Gun
431.description:
A toy dart gun reinforced and modified to fire 
sharpened skewers.

432.name: Sharpened Pool Cue
432.description:
A pool cue with one end sharpened to a point for 
thrusting attacks.

433.name: Chain Rolling Pin
433.description:
A wooden rolling pin wrapped with chains for added
impact damage.

434.name: Combat Fishing Rod
434.description:
A fishing rod modified to cast small spiked 
weights as weapons.

435.name: Combat Scissors
435.description:
A pair of scissors with the handles wrapped in 
tape for better grip.

436.name: Toolbox Flail
436.description:
An old toolbox filled with heavy objects and 
attached to a chain.

437.name: Kitchen Knife
437.description:
A steak knife with the handle wrapped in cloth 
strips for better grip.

438.name: Potato Cannon
438.description:
A potato gun built from PVC pipes, capable of 
firing small, hard projectiles.

439.name: Heavy Buckle Belt
439.description:
A belt with its buckle reinforced to be used as a 
quick striking weapon.

440.name: Cheap Sword
440.description:
A poorly forged sword with a dull edge and weak 
metal that chips easily.

441.name: Budget Axe
441.description:
A mass-produced axe with a loose head that wobbles
when swung.

442.name: Apprentice Staff
442.description:
A flimsy staff made from green wood that bends 
when struck with force.

443.name: Flimsy Bow
443.description:
A crude bow made from a weak, knotted wood that 
might snap at any moment.

444.name: Crude Spear
444.description:
A simple spear with a dull iron tip that bends on 
impact.

445.name: Shoddy Knuckles
445.description:
Poorly tanned leather gloves with small metal 
studs that come loose easily.

446.name: Bargain Knife
446.description:
A poorly balanced knife with a handle that comes 
loose from the blade.

447.name: Pot Metal Mace
447.description:
A mace with a head made from weak pot metal that 
dents easily.

448.name: Unreliable Crossbow
448.description:
A crossbow with a weak firing mechanism that often
fails to launch bolts properly.

449.name: Dull Claws
449.description:
Poorly crafted claws made from weak metal that 
dulls quickly.

450.name: Unreliable Pistol
450.description:
A pistol made from substandard parts that 
frequently jams and misfires.

451.name: Unwieldy Hammer
451.description:
A giant hammer that's too heavy for its poorly 
made handle.

452.name: Cracked Whip
452.description:
A whip made from poorly tanned leather that cracks
and splits easily.

453.name: Training Sword
453.description:
A worn-out training sword with a blunted edge and 
splintering handle.

454.name: Rusty Rifle
454.description:
An ancient rifle with a rusty barrel and worn 
firing mechanism.

455.name: Dented Pan
455.description:
A dented frying pan pressed into service as a 
makeshift weapon.

456.name: Stretchy Sling
456.description:
A sling made from poor quality leather that 
stretches unpredictably.

457.name: Splintered Club
457.description:
A wooden club with splits and cracks running 
through it.

458.name: Walking Stick
458.description:
A walking stick repurposed as a weapon, with a 
weak shaft that flexes too much.

459.name: Leaky Blowgun
459.description:
A blow dart tube made from a cracked reed that 
leaks air.

460.name: Practice Axe
460.description:
A wooden practice axe with a dulled edge for 
training purposes.

461.name: Warped Arrows
461.description:
Cheap arrows with warped shafts and poorly 
attached fletching.

462.name: Makeshift Boxing Gloves
462.description:
Thin leather gloves with small iron nuggets sewn 
in that shift position.

463.name: Decorative Sword
463.description:
A mass-produced ceremonial sword with no edge, 
meant for display only.

464.name: Loose-headed Spear
464.description:
A spear with a head attached by loose bindings 
that might come undone.

465.name: Tin Claws
465.description:
Metal claws fashioned from cheap tin that bend out
of shape easily.

466.name: Novice Wand
466.description:
A wand made from poor quality wood with minimal 
magical conductivity.

467.name: Uneven Slingshot
467.description:
A handmade slingshot with an uneven fork and weak 
elastic.

468.name: Rusty Sickle
468.description:
A farming sickle repurposed as a weapon, with a 
loose handle and spotted rust.

469.name: Wooden Flail
469.description:
A flail with a lightweight wooden head that causes
minimal damage.

470.name: Misaligned Hand Crossbow
470.description:
A pistol crossbow made from weak wood that 
frequently needs realignment.

471.name: Unbalanced Throwing Knife
471.description:
A poorly balanced throwing knife that wobbles in 
flight.

472.name: Beginner's Hand Wraps
472.description:
Flimsy leather hand wraps with small metal bits 
for striking.

473.name: Toy Bow
473.description:
A toy bow made from flexible plastic with weak 
elastic string.

474.name: Wooden Play Sword
474.description:
A wooden sword used by children for playtime 
battles.

475.name: Carved Stick
475.description:
A stick with crude carvings meant to resemble a 
magical staff.

476.name: Suction Cup Dart Gun
476.description:
A dart gun that uses suction cups instead of 
pointed tips.

477.name: Foam Toy Axe
477.description: A plastic toy axe with soft foam edges for safety.

478.name: Fly Swatter
478.description:
A swatter typically used for insects, made from 
lightweight plastic.

479.name: Stale Baguette
479.description:
A stick of bread that's gone stale and hard as a 
rock.

480.name: Sarcastic Pillow
480.description:
A sentient pillow that smacks enemies with 
surprising force and occasionally whispers insults at them.

481.name: Spud Launcher Deluxe
481.description:
A potato gun that fires genetically modified 
exploding potatoes that detonate on impact.

482.name: Phantom Tickle Gloves
482.description:
Gloves that summon ghostly hands to tickle enemies
into submission, causing uncontrollable laughter.

483.name: Number One Fan
483.description:
A giant foam finger that somehow hits with the 
force of a sledgehammer while making cartoon sound effects.

484.name: Extreme T-Shirt Cannon
484.description:
A modified t-shirt cannon that fires shirts so 
hard they can knock down castle walls.

485.name: Combatant Angler
485.description:
A fishing rod that catches and weaponizes random 
sea creatures to fight for you.

486.name: Master Flipper
486.description:
A spatula that flips enemies as easily as 
pancakes, temporarily reversing their controls.

487.name: Peppermint Scepter
487.description:
A staff made from a giant candy cane that shoots 
peppermint beams and makes enemies smell delicious.

488.name: Bounce Bubble Blower
488.description:
A bubble wand that creates unbreakable bubbles 
that trap enemies and bounce them around the battlefield.

489.name: Honking Mallet Duo
489.description:
A pair of squeaky toy hammers that create 
shockwaves when squeaked together.

490.name: EMP Disruptor
490.description:
A handheld electromagnetic pulse device that 
disables electronic systems and cybernetic implants.

491.name: Pepper Spray Cannon
491.description:
A spray canister that fires concentrated capsaicin 
for non-lethal crowd control.

492.name: Taser Rifle
492.description:
A weapon that fires electroshock darts to 
incapacitate targets non-lethally.

493.name: Drone Swarm Launcher
493.description:
A shoulder-mounted device that launches small 
autonomous attack drones.

494.name: Spiked Battle Shield
494.description:
A reinforced shield with spikes and a razor edge 
that can be used for devastating shield bashes.

495.name: War Pick
495.description:
A military hammer with a pick on the reverse side 
for penetrating armor.

496.name: Naval Cutlass
496.description:
A curved naval sword designed for close-quarters 
combat on ships.

497.name: Boarding Pike
497.description:
A long pike designed for repelling boarders on 
ships.

498.name: Naval Dirk
498.description:
A short dagger used by sailors for shipboard 
combat and utility work.

499.name: Sword Breaker
499.description:
A specialized sword designed to catch and break 
enemy blades.

500.name: Francisca
500.description:
A Frankish throwing axe designed for both melee 
and ranged combat.

501.name: Glaive
501.description:
A polearm with a curved blade, effective against 
cavalry.

502.name: Flanged War Mace
502.description:
A heavy mace with flanged head designed to crush 
armor.

503.name: Steel Cable Whip
503.description:
A whip made from braided steel cable that can 
slice through armor.

504.name: Neural Scrambler
504.description:
A device that generates a localized electromagnetic 
field to disrupt neural activity.

505.name: Phase Blade
505.description:
A sword that exists partially in another dimension,
allowing it to phase through defenses.

506.name: Symbiotic Blade
506.description:
A living weapon that bonds with its wielder, 
growing stronger over time.

507.name: Chronos Hammer
507.description:
A weapon that slows time around targets when it 
strikes.

508.name: Metamorphic Gauntlets
508.description:
Gauntlets that can transform into various weapon 
forms at will.

509.name: Modular Combat Rifle
509.description:
A rifle with interchangeable barrels and modular 
components for different combat situations.

510.name: Multi-Bolt Crossbow
510.description:
A crossbow that fires different types of 
specialized bolts for various effects.

511.name: Cyber Warfare Device
511.description:
A device that hacks into enemy systems and turns 
them against their allies.

512.name: Variable Chain Hammer
512.description:
A meteor hammer with extendable chain length for 
variable range attacks.

513.name: Infinite Quiver Bow
513.description:
A bow that creates arrows from ambient energy, 
never running out of ammunition.

514.name: Returning Discus
514.description:
A circular blade weapon that returns to the 
thrower after striking targets.

515.name: Energy Lash
515.description:
A whip made from pure energy that can extend to 
great lengths.

516.name: Timed Explosive Launcher
516.description:
A launcher that fires timed explosive charges with
adjustable detonation delays.

517.name: Siege Breaker
517.description:
A massive two-handed mace designed to shatter 
fortifications.

518.name: Life Drain Claws
518.description:
Claws that drain the life force of targets and 
transfer it to the wielder.

519.name: Gravity Manipulation Staff
519.description:
A staff that manipulates gravitational fields to 
crush or lift enemies.

520.name: Smart Tracking Rifle
520.description:
A sniper rifle with smart ammunition that tracks 
and adjusts its trajectory mid-flight.

521.name: Dimensional Cleaver
521.description:
An axe that cleaves through multiple dimensions, 
hitting enemies in parallel realities.

522.name: Temporal Echo Whip
522.description:
A whip that exists in multiple timelines 
simultaneously, striking the same target multiple times.

523.name: Adaptive Combat AI
523.description:
A weapon system that learns from combat and adapts
its tactics and ammunition type.

524.name: Molecular Manipulator Gloves
524.description:
Gauntlets that allow the wearer to manipulate 
matter at the molecular level.

525.name: Quantum Superposition Blade
525.description:
A sword that exists in a state of quantum 
superposition, striking all possible targets simultaneously.

526.name: Universal Force Staff
526.description:
A staff that channels the fundamental forces of 
the universe itself.

527.name: Reality Distortion Cannon
527.description:
A reality-warping weapon that can rewrite the 
laws of physics in a localized area.

528.name: Omniadaptive Combat System
528.description:
The ultimate expression of combat technology, 
capable of adapting to any threat.

529.name: Seed Dagger
529.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

530.name: Seed Sword
530.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

531.name: Seed Mace
531.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

532.name: Seed Axe
532.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

533.name: Seed Whip
533.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

534.name: Seed Staff
534.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

535.name: Seed Bow
535.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

536.name: Seed Grimorie
536.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

537.name: Seed Gun
537.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

538.name: Seed Claw
538.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

539.name: Seed Glove
539.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.

540.name: Seed Spear
540.description: A light and easy-to-wield short-bladed sword.
